props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: @deprecated Use GoAFilterChip instead. Icon displayed at the start of the chip.

props.name: icontheme
props.description: @deprecated Use GoAFilterChip instead. The icon theme - outline or filled.

props.name: error
props.description: @deprecated Use GoAFilterChip instead. Shows an error state on the chip.

props.name: deletable
props.description: @deprecated Use GoAFilterChip instead. When true, shows a delete icon and makes chip clickable.

props.name: content
props.description: @deprecated Use GoAFilterChip instead. The text content displayed in the chip.

props.name: variant
props.description: @deprecated Use GoAFilterChip instead. The chip variant style.

props.name: testId
